title: Monday Vibe Disappeared off of Board
excerpt: I had (and continue to pay for) Monday Vibe - but the apps I created literally just disappeared from my board. It still shows up in as live in my vibe apps and I can access the backend - but any time I try to view in the…

posts.author: TaliG (Tali Gottlieb )
posts.cookedHtml: I had (and continue to pay for) Monday Vibe - but the apps I created literally just disappeared from my board. It still shows up in as live in my vibe apps and I can access the backend - but any time I try to view in the board it just takes me to the main page and stalls.

posts.author: mia-cxmonday (Mia Leath)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Tali! Mia from monday.com here.

That definitely shouldn’t be happening. I’d like to take a closer look - could you DM me your account name? I’ll open a ticket for you immediately so our team can dive in.

Thanks!

posts.author: amichay (Amichay Even Chen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @TaliG
If the view was deleted you can look for it in the + menu on the board under “apps”:

image1308×1276 177 KB
